tasks.title: Harden worktree fallback branch creation against branch-name collisions
tasks.details: WorktreeManager.create() falls back to `git worktree add -b factory/<base>/<taskId>` when base branch is already checked out. If the same taskId is retried or reused, branch creation can fail with 'branch already exists'. Add collision handling (e.g., existence check + suffixing or -B strategy with safeguards) and tests for repeated task retries.

tasks.title: Prevent cleanup failures from masking task outcomes
tasks.details: completeTask() and failTask() call worktreeManager.remove() without guarding cleanup errors. If cleanup fails (already removed, lock, path issue), it can throw and obscure the real execution/validation result. Wrap cleanup in try/catch, preserve original task result, and emit structured warning telemetry.

tasks.title: Tighten cross-repo failure normalization
tasks.details: _processCrossRepoTask() currently records null repo results as `{status: 'pending'}` which is treated as partial later. Normalize null/empty results to explicit failed status + error reason so reports and stop conditions remain deterministic.

tasks.title: Expand direct unit coverage for core orchestrator primitives
tasks.details: Add focused tests for src/code-executor.js, src/task-manager.js, src/push-pr-manager.js, src/metrics-writer.js, and src/critic-gate.js edge cases. Current suite passes and covers flows, but these modules have limited direct-edge coverage (timeouts, malformed persisted JSONL, empty commit states, gate override behavior).

tasks.title: Refactor CLI option parsing and numeric coercion
tasks.details: parseArgs() uses manual parsing and downstream `||` fallbacks, which can blur intentional zero/false-like values and make validation brittle. Refactor to centralized option schema with explicit integer validation and nullish coalescing for deterministic defaults.

tasks.title: Fix cross-repo status derivation to respect failed results
tasks.details: _processCrossRepoTask() computes final status using `r.status === 'completed'`, but repo results from factory.processNext() often omit `status` and only set `failed: true`. This can misclassify successful or failed tasks as `partial`. Normalize each repo result before aggregation and treat explicit `failed`/`error` as failure deterministically.

tasks.title: Add regression tests for cross-repo normalization and aggregate status
tasks.details: Add tests where factory.processNext() returns (a) completed result without status, (b) failed result with failed:true and no status, and (c) null result. Assert _processCrossRepoTask() output status and per-repo normalization are deterministic and do not rely on missing status fields.

tasks.title: Make task intake IDs deterministic under parallel submissions
tasks.details: submitCrossRepoTask() uses Date.now()+Math.random() for IDs. Replace with uuid-based IDs (already used elsewhere) to avoid collision risk, improve traceability, and simplify log correlation across retries and distributed runners.

tasks.title: Extract safe worktree cleanup helper for complete/fail paths
tasks.details: completeTask() and failTask() duplicate cleanup and metrics scaffolding. Extract a shared helper that performs guarded worktree cleanup and common metric envelope creation, reducing drift and ensuring future reliability fixes apply consistently to both paths.

tasks.title: Harden CLI numeric flags to preserve explicit zero values
tasks.details: watch-mode options currently use `args.value || config.value || default`, which drops valid parsed zeros and makes behavior implicit. Switch to explicit finite-number validation and nullish-coalescing (`??`) so `0` and invalid numbers are handled deterministically with clear errors.

tasks.title: Add tests for CLI flag coercion and invalid numeric input
tasks.details: Add cases for `--interval`, `--retry-budget`, `--max-tasks`, and `--max-polls` covering explicit zero, negative, NaN, and omitted values. Assert deterministic fallback/error behavior and prevent regressions in watch-mode runtime limits.

tasks.title: Bound in-memory processed-issue set for long-running watchers
tasks.details: IssueWatcher stores processed issue numbers in an unbounded Set for the process lifetime. Add bounded retention (LRU or TTL window) and a focused test to prevent memory growth during long daemon runs on high-volume repos.

tasks.title: Guard TaskManager load against malformed/empty queue lines
tasks.details:
TaskManager.loadQueue() does `content.trim().split('
')`; whitespace-only files still create parse-attempt noise and malformed lines only log errors. Add early return for blank content, structured parse warnings, and tests for truncated JSONL recovery to avoid noisy startup and partial-state ambiguity.

tasks.title: Validate MetricsWriter payload before record() persists
tasks.details: MetricsWriter.record() assumes `task` and `startTime` are present; missing/invalid values produce NaN/invalid durations and potentially misleading metrics. Add input validation + sane defaults and tests for undefined task/startTime to keep stats trustworthy.

tasks.title: Add focused tests for TaskManager persistence edge cases
tasks.details: Add direct unit tests for TaskManager covering duplicate IDs, stale queue entries, malformed JSONL lines, and load/save idempotence under restart. Current integration paths pass but these persistence edge cases are under-tested.

tasks.title: Quote/sanitize shell arguments in PushPRManager git/gh commands
tasks.details: PushPRManager builds shell commands with string interpolation (`git -C ${wt.path} ...`, `gh pr create --title "${prTitle}" ...`). Task titles, repo strings, and paths can contain shell-sensitive characters and break commands or enable injection. Replace with execFile/spawn argv usage and add tests for quotes/newlines/special chars in title/repo/path.

tasks.title: Escape markdown fields in CriticGate-generated PR body
tasks.details: generatePRBody() embeds raw task title/description/errors into markdown. Special sequences/backticks can break formatting and make review output hard to parse. Add lightweight markdown escaping/truncation for untrusted text fields and coverage tests for multiline/error-heavy payloads.

tasks.title: Add integration tests for PushPRManager command construction
tasks.details: Add tests that mock command execution to assert branch detection, push, and PR-creation command args are correctly formed and safe. Include force mode + disabled push paths to ensure deterministic errors and no accidental external side effects.

tasks.title: Sanitize shell invocation in CodeExecutor stage/remediation commands
tasks.details: CodeExecutor uses shell strings like `cd ${worktreePath} && ...` and interpolates remediation commands directly. Replace with execFile/spawn argv or validated wrappers to avoid shell injection/escaping bugs from paths and generated commands. Add tests for spaces/quotes/special chars in worktree paths.

tasks.title: Make test command strategy project-aware (avoid hardcoded --run flag)
tasks.details: runTests() always executes `npm test -- --run`, which is runner-specific and can fail on repositories that do not support that argument. Add configurable/default test command resolution per repo and fallback behavior, with tests covering incompatible test runners.

tasks.title: Harden AgentRunner binary availability checks and preset model config
tasks.details: AgentRunner.isAvailable() uses `which ${bin}` shell execution and codex preset hardcodes `-m o4-mini`. Replace availability checks with non-shell resolution, make model configurable via options/env, and add tests for customBin edge cases and deterministic preset args.

tasks.title: Ensure fatal processNext errors still execute unified fail path cleanup
tasks.details: processNext() catch block calls taskManager.fail() directly instead of failTask(), skipping metrics emission and worktree cleanup when unexpected exceptions occur after worktree creation. Route all fatal paths through failTask() (or shared finalizer) and add regression tests to prevent orphaned worktrees and missing failure telemetry.

tasks.title: Normalize cross-repo aggregate status to include hard-fail state
tasks.details: _processCrossRepoTask() currently collapses non-all-completed outcomes to 'partial'. Introduce deterministic aggregate states (completed|partial|failed) so all-failed scenarios are not hidden as partial. Add tests for all-failed and mixed outcomes.

tasks.title: Externalize stage commands in CodeExecutor (lint/test/commit strategy)
tasks.details: CodeExecutor hardcodes npm-oriented lint/test flow and commit behavior, reducing portability across non-NPM or custom runner repos. Add configurable per-repo command strategy (with safe defaults), and cover unsupported-runner fallback behavior in tests.

tasks.title: Add direct unit tests for CodingFactory failure/finalization paths
tasks.details: Current tests cover happy-flow and integration scenarios, but there is no focused unit coverage for CodingFactory finalization branches (validation fail, push/PR fail, thrown exceptions). Add tests asserting status transitions, cleanup invocation, and metrics writes on every terminal path.

tasks.title: Persist processed issue state across watcher restarts
tasks.details: IssueWatcher keeps processed issue IDs only in-memory; daemon restart loses dedupe context and can reprocess recently handled issues. Add lightweight persisted dedupe cache with bounded retention (TTL/LRU) and recovery tests.

tasks.title: Propagate RedTeamFactory push/PR flags into orchestrated factories
tasks.details: RedTeamFactory accepts enablePush/createPR in config, but initialize() does not pass them into MultiRepoOrchestrator, and _initializeFactories() hardcodes enablePush/createPR false. As a result push/PR is silently disabled even when configured. Thread these flags through orchestrator/factory config and add integration tests asserting push/PR settings are honored.

tasks.title: Add unit coverage for RedTeamFactory configuration passthrough and state persistence edge cases
tasks.details: Expand RedTeamFactory tests to validate constructor config passthrough (enablePush/createPR/retry settings) and saveState() behavior when target directory does not exist or write fails. Current tests verify happy path only, leaving config drift and IO error handling unguarded.

tasks.title: Sanitize gh CLI command construction in GitHubIntake methods
tasks.details: GitHubIntake builds gh commands via string interpolation for repo/labels/issue body/comment text. Special shell characters in repo names, labels, or user-provided issue/comment content can break commands or enable injection. Replace execSync string commands with execFile/spawn argv and add tests covering quotes/newlines/shell metacharacters.

tasks.title: Implement real sessions_spawn/sessions_history agent flow in AgentIntegration
tasks.details: AgentIntegration currently simulates sub-agent execution with timers and synthetic session keys, which diverges from production behavior and can hide orchestration failures. Integrate real sessions_spawn + sessions_history flow behind an adapter, keep deterministic mock mode for tests, and add failure/timeout/retry-path coverage.

tasks.title: Add resilience and observability for GitHubIntake parse/auth failures
tasks.details: fetchIssues() swallows gh/JSON parse failures by returning [] without structured error context. Add explicit error classification/telemetry (auth failure, rate limit, parse error, command timeout), expose last poll error for watcher decisions, and add tests for malformed JSON and gh non-zero exit scenarios.

tasks.title: Cap fix-task fan-out in ResultValidator to prevent runaway retry loops
tasks.details: enqueueFix() always creates a new fix task when validation fails, without parent-depth or duplicate-error guards. Repeated deterministic failures can produce unbounded fix-task chains. Add max fix-depth / dedupe policy (e.g., hash validation errors + parent lineage) and tests to prevent queue explosion.

tasks.title: Use monotonic timing for SelfHealingCI retry/backoff accounting
tasks.details: Retry/backoff/report timing currently relies on wall-clock Date timestamps, which are vulnerable to system clock adjustments during long runs. Introduce monotonic timing source for elapsed calculations and keep ISO timestamps only for audit logs. Add unit tests around retry delay math and reporting consistency.

tasks.title: Add deterministic tests for ResultValidator strict/typecheck gating behavior
tasks.details: ResultValidator supports strict mode requiring typecheck, but current tests focus mainly on default flows. Add explicit strict-mode test matrix (missing typecheck, failed typecheck, successful all-steps) and assertions for short-circuit artifact behavior.

tasks.title: Validate governance policy numeric fields to prevent NaN gate behavior
tasks.details: evaluateGovernance() coerces policy values with Number(...), but invalid strings produce NaN and silently corrupt gate logic (flake/coverage comparisons). Add explicit finite-number validation with clear errors/defaults, and tests for malformed policy input.

tasks.title: Add candidate report schema validation for governance inputs
tasks.details: Governance evaluation assumes baseline/candidate report shapes are well-formed. Add lightweight schema checks (goldenCases array entries, coverage.linePct, flakeRatePct) with actionable error messages to avoid false gate outcomes on malformed JSON.

tasks.title: Harden copilot metrics threshold parsing and boundary tests
tasks.details: evaluateCopilotReviewMetrics() parses policy thresholds via Number(...) without validating finiteness/range (negative percentages, NaN, Infinity). Add strict threshold validation and boundary tests for minSampleSize/minSnr/adoption/ignored limits to keep gate decisions deterministic.

tasks.title: Harden factory-run.sh command execution to avoid shell injection and quoting drift
tasks.details: factory-run.sh executes user/config-provided values via `bash -lc` (agent_cmd/test_cmd) and interpolated gh/git strings. This is vulnerable to shell metacharacter injection and fragile quoting. Refactor to argv-based execution where possible, restrict/validate command inputs, and add tests for spaces/quotes/newlines in task/test command values.

tasks.title: Replace brittle CI check parsing in factory-run.sh with structured status handling
tasks.details: CI polling currently greps free-form `gh pr checks` output for fail/pass substrings, which can misclassify pending or mixed states. Switch to JSON/status-conclusion based parsing (or gh api) with explicit terminal states and timeouts, plus tests for pending/failure/success edge cases.

tasks.title: Add dedicated test coverage for factory-run.sh metrics and PR/CI control flow
tasks.details: The shell runner contains critical orchestration logic (metrics append, CI retry loop, escalation behavior) but lacks focused automated tests. Add hermetic script-level tests with mocked git/gh/curl to cover pass/fail, create-pr enabled/disabled, retries exhausted, and malformed metrics file recovery.

tasks.title: Introduce automated code coverage reporting and minimum thresholds
tasks.details: The current test suite passes but does not emit line/branch/function coverage or enforce minimum thresholds. Add c8/nyc-based coverage collection, publish coverage summaries in CI, and fail builds when minimum thresholds regress.

tasks.title: Refactor monolithic npm test script into maintainable test runner
tasks.details: package.json chains many test files in a single long command, which is hard to maintain and debug. Replace with a small test runner script (or npm-run-all style grouping) with clearer grouping/output and easier per-suite execution.

tasks.title: Add smoke tests to verify task registry schema validity
tasks.details: Recent changes are concentrated in ops/task-registry.json. Add a schema validation test (required fields, enum checks, duplicate ID detection) to prevent malformed backlog entries from breaking automation that consumes this file.

tasks.title: Add changed-files aware CI test selection to reduce feedback time
tasks.details: Full test runs are deterministic but always execute every suite even for docs/ops-only changes. Add optional changed-files scoped test selection (with full run fallback in protected branches) to speed local and CI feedback without reducing safety.

tasks.title: Emit structured machine-readable test summary artifact
tasks.details: Tests print human-readable logs only. Add a JSON summary artifact (suite pass/fail counts, duration, failures) for downstream automation, dashboards, and deterministic quality reporting in autonomous loops.

tasks.title: Sanitize IssueWatcher in-progress label removal command
tasks.details: IssueWatcher._removeInProgressLabel() executes `gh issue edit` via interpolated shell string using repo and issueNumber. Replace with execFile/spawn argv usage and add tests for special characters/invalid input to avoid shell injection and quoting breakage.

tasks.title: Include orphaned phase1 test suite in default npm test pipeline
tasks.details: test/phase1.test.js exists but is not included in the package.json test command chain. Add it (or formally retire it) so foundational worktree/task intake checks are continuously exercised and do not silently regress.

tasks.title: Add static-analysis quality gate to complement runtime tests
tasks.details: Current quality checks rely almost entirely on runtime tests. Add a deterministic static-analysis step (eslint ruleset with CI gate and autofix profile) to catch unsafe patterns early (unused branches, accidental globals, unreachable code, unsafe string commands).

tasks.title: Migrate ad-hoc test harnesses to Node built-in test runner for maintainability
tasks.details: Many suites implement custom pass/fail counters and explicit process.exit logic. Standardize on node:test (or a thin shared harness) to reduce duplicated boilerplate, improve diagnostics, and simplify per-test timeout/skip controls.

tasks.title: Add fast smoke-test target separate from full integration matrix
tasks.details: Current default test command always executes heavy integration suites, increasing local feedback time for small changes. Add a deterministic smoke target for quick validation (unit + critical paths) and keep full matrix for pre-merge/CI gates.

tasks.title: Normalize run ID generation in RedTeamFactory to UUID-based identifiers
tasks.details: RedTeamFactory currently builds run IDs with Date.now(), which is less collision-resistant and inconsistent with UUID task/worktree IDs elsewhere. Use UUID-based run identifiers for deterministic traceability across concurrent runs and restarts.

tasks.title: Quote test fixture shell paths to prevent whitespace/metacharacter breakage
tasks.details: Integration tests build git/rm commands with unquoted interpolated paths (e.g., `rm -rf ${TEST_DIR}`, `git clone ${bare} ${work}`). Paths with spaces or shell metacharacters can break tests and create unsafe behavior. Move to execFile/spawn argv or robust shell escaping helper and add regression cases with space-containing temp paths.

tasks.title: Extract shared test-repo fixture builder to remove duplicated setup logic
tasks.details: Multiple integration suites duplicate repo bootstrap/cleanup logic (init bare repo, clone, configure git user, seed package.json). Centralize this into a shared helper to reduce drift, simplify future hardening fixes, and keep test setup deterministic across suites.

tasks.title: Add performance budget guard for default full test matrix runtime
tasks.details: Default `npm test` runs a long sequential integration-heavy chain but no runtime budget is tracked. Add a lightweight timing guard/report (per-suite + total) with warning/fail thresholds to detect regression in feedback time as suites grow.

tasks.title: Add structured error metadata for GitHubIntake fetch failures
tasks.details: fetchIssues() currently logs plain-text errors and returns empty arrays on failure. Add structured error objects (type/code/source command + retryability) to improve watcher decision-making and prevent silent quality drift when gh calls fail.

tasks.title: Replace bare console.error usage with leveled logger abstraction
tasks.details: Core modules rely on direct console.error/log calls, making observability inconsistent and hard to route in CI/daemon contexts. Introduce a lightweight logger interface (debug/info/warn/error with context fields) and migrate critical orchestration paths first.

tasks.title: Add deterministic cleanup verification for integration test temp artifacts
tasks.details: Integration suites perform best-effort cleanup but do not assert cleanup completeness. Add post-suite checks ensuring test dirs/worktrees are removed to catch resource leaks and flaky rerun behavior early.

tasks.title: Stop logging raw task JSONL lines on parse failure in TaskManager/WorktreeManager
tasks.details: Current parse-failure handlers log full malformed lines, which can leak sensitive task contents or prompt payloads into logs. Replace with truncated/sanitized excerpts + line index/context metadata, and add tests asserting no full payload leakage.

tasks.title: Add deterministic seedable ID generator option for orchestration tests
tasks.details: Tests currently rely on time/random-derived IDs in several code paths, which reduces reproducibility in snapshot/assertion-heavy diagnostics. Add injectable ID generator (default UUID) so tests can use deterministic seeds while production remains collision-safe.

tasks.title: Add retry/timeout coverage for gh auth and issue-edit command paths
tasks.details: Current tests cover happy-path behavior but have limited focused coverage for gh auth timeout, auth failure, and issue-label removal command failures. Add mocks for non-zero exits/timeouts and assert fallback behavior and error classification are deterministic.

tasks.title: Reduce false-positive FAIL signals in passing test logs
tasks.details: The validator unit suite intentionally prints per-case 'validation: FAIL' lines while the suite passes overall. These strings can trigger naive CI log scrapers and alerting rules. Refactor test logging to clearly mark expected failures (e.g., EXPECTED_FAIL_CASE) and add a regression check for unambiguous pass/fail summary output.

tasks.title: Add changed-files quality gate for ops-only/task-registry changes
tasks.details: Recent commits touched only ops/task-registry.json, but full integration matrix still ran. Add an optional changed-files-aware gate that runs schema + lint + smoke checks for ops/docs-only changes, while preserving full matrix on protected branches and code changes.

tasks.title: Add deterministic schema validation test for task-registry modifications
tasks.details: Task registry changed in multiple consecutive commits. Add a dedicated schema validator test that enforces required fields, enum values, ISO timestamp format, and monotonically unique IDs to prevent backlog automation breakage from malformed entries.

tasks.title: Emit compact JUnit-style test artifact for CI quality dashboards
tasks.details: Current `npm test` output is human-readable only and very verbose. Add optional JUnit (or equivalent machine-readable) artifact emission so CI can surface flaky suites, duration hotspots, and regressions without brittle log parsing.

tasks.title: Establish per-suite runtime baseline and regression budget
tasks.details: The default matrix runs many sequential suites and currently took a long end-to-end run. Capture per-suite timing baselines and add a configurable regression budget warning/fail mode to prevent gradual feedback-time erosion.

tasks.title: Stabilize cross-repo task ID generation away from Date.now()+Math.random()
tasks.details: Cross-repo IDs still appear as `cross-repo-<timestamp>-<random>` in test output, which is non-deterministic and harder to trace/debug. Replace with UUID-based IDs (or injectable deterministic generator for tests) and update assertions/log correlation helpers.

tasks.title: Add path-safe fixture creation helper for integration test repositories
tasks.details: Integration suites repeat shell-heavy git setup patterns for temporary repos. Centralize into a shared helper using argv-based process execution to reduce duplication and remove path quoting fragility across suites.

tasks.title: Introduce concise mode for default npm test logs in CI
tasks.details: Current `npm test` output is very verbose, making failures harder to spot quickly. Add an optional concise/summary mode that preserves full logs as artifacts while surfacing per-suite pass/fail and elapsed time in the console.

tasks.title: Add guardrail test for accidental orphaned worktrees after failing runs
tasks.details: Although happy-path cleanup passes, add a regression case that forces mid-pipeline exceptions and asserts no worktree directories remain after failure finalization to prevent disk bloat in long-running agents.

tasks.title: Add static check to fail if package.json test chain omits known core suites
tasks.details: The test chain is manually maintained and prone to accidental suite omission. Add a lightweight meta-test that validates required core suites are included (or explicitly deprecated) in the default test pipeline.

tasks.title: Split default test pipeline into grouped scripts for maintainability
tasks.details: `npm test` is a long chained command that is hard to maintain and debug. Introduce grouped npm scripts (core, integration, governance, watcher) and a top-level runner that preserves ordering while making failures easier to isolate.

tasks.title: Add machine-readable test summary JSON artifact to default test run
tasks.details: Current output is console-first and difficult for automation to consume. Emit a deterministic JSON summary (suite, status, duration, failures) to support CI dashboards and downstream quality gates.

tasks.title: Enforce duplicate task-id detection in task-registry CI checks
tasks.details: Task registry updates are frequent. Add an automated check to fail on duplicate IDs and malformed timestamp fields before merge so backlog tooling remains stable.

tasks.title: Add deterministic log markers for expected negative-path unit tests
tasks.details: Negative-path tests currently print generic FAIL strings even when expected. Standardize on explicit markers (e.g., EXPECTED_NEGATIVE_PATH) to reduce false alerting and simplify log post-processing.

tasks.title: Add per-suite runtime trend report for regression detection
tasks.details: Capture and persist per-suite runtimes across runs and surface trend deltas, so slow regression in integration suites is caught early without waiting for major runtime spikes.
